title: stillingia schottiana
intro: Stillingia schottiana, also known as King's Evensong or King's Spikenard, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds such as saponins and alkaloids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stillingia schottiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valued remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are often dried and used as an extract, tincture, or infused in teas to harness its medicinal properties.
